title: LL-37
description: LL-37 is a human antimicrobial peptide (cathelicidin) that plays a crucial role in innate immunity. It has antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties, and also modulates inflammation and wound healing.

research.title: The structure of the antimicrobial human cathelicidin LL-37 shows oligomerization and channel formation in the presence of membrane mimics
research.summary: LL-37 creates a narrow tetrameric channel in bacterial cell walls, causing cell wall damage and cell death.

research.title: Antimicrobial cathelicidin peptide LL-37 inhibits the pyroptosis of macrophages and improves the survival of polybacterial septic mice
research.summary: LL-37 improves survival in septic mice by suppressing macrophage pyroptosis and inflammatory cytokine production.

research.title: LL-37: Cathelicidin-related antimicrobial peptide with pleiotropic activity
research.summary: LL-37 exhibits broad-spectrum antibiotic activity with chemotactic and immunomodulatory properties.

research.title: The Human Cathelicidin Antimicrobial Peptide LL-37 and Mimics are Potential Anticancer Drugs
research.summary: LL-37 and its fragments demonstrate potential anticancer effects across various cancer cell lines.

research.title: A comprehensive summary of LL-37, the factotum human cathelicidin peptide
research.summary: LL-37 exhibits pleiotropic antibacterial, antifungal, antiviral, and chemotactic properties with immunostimulatory effects.

research.title: The human cathelicidin peptide LL-37 inhibits pancreatic cancer growth by suppressing autophagy and reprogramming of the tumor immune microenvironment
research.summary: LL-37 inhibits pancreatic cancer growth through autophagy suppression and immune microenvironment reprogramming.

sentiment.summary: Used primarily for immune support and infection management. Users with chronic infections report benefits. More common in clinical and biohacking contexts.

effects.label: Broad Spectrum:
effects.description: Active against many types of pathogens.

effects.label: Immune Support:
effects.description: May help with chronic or recurring infections.

effects.label: Synergy:
effects.description: Sometimes combined with other antimicrobial peptides.

dosage.label: Frequency:
dosage.description: Often daily or every other day during acute use.

availability.label: Specialized Use:
availability.description: Not as common as other peptides.
